reference: I am experiencing recent and painful tibialis anterior cramping during the night. It has been particularly pronounced the last two nights. It occurs in both legs and can last for several minutes. However, there is no swelling or discoloration. During the day, there is some very mild tenderness but no pain, fatigue, or cramping. I have been taking calcium and multivitamins, and I massage my feet and lower legs before bedtime. Any suggestions?
text: I am experiencing recent painful pity allergy with symptoms in my mouth. It has been particularly pronounced the last time. The Persian border has been marked for several months. However, there is no sign of the corona. During the day, there is a very mild thunder that may change the tune for some. I have been taking melatonin and methyl salicylate, and it died my feet and my legs before bedtime. Any suggestion?
